title: rubus × infuscus
intro: Rubus × infuscus, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid of the American black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the European thornless black raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × infuscus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or juice, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other culinary preparations.
